title: Marketplace Manager - Sugar Cosmetics - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Sugar Cosmetics - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Sugar Cosmetics! We are hiring a Marketplace Manager for our Gwalior team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Sugar Cosmetics:
Sugar Cosmetics is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sugar Cosmetics!
